subcodes.first_line: O Pen of Glory! Make mention of him who is named Abu'l-Qásim, that he may render thanks unto his Lord, the Compassionate, the Bountiful. Verily he hath [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلم البهاء ان اذکر من سمی بابی القاسم لیشکر ربه المشفق الکریم انه قد
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement
